Vaultup is the AI money coach built around saving for what you actually want — not controlling what you spend. Meet Val, your straight-talking financial coach who knows your numbers and tells you exactly where you stand.

Why we built this
"Bank apps want to
control your spending.
We want to build
your saving habit."

As a finance professional who studied in the UK, I watched friends — and myself — struggle with money not because we were bad with it, but because every tool out there tells you what not to do. Cut the coffee. Cancel the subscription. Stop going out.

Real life doesn't work like that. Vaultup works differently — it helps you save proactively for the things you actually want. Holiday. Car. Emergency fund. A night out with friends. You tell Val what matters, and she helps you get there — without the guilt trip.

Piyush Kadam · Founder, Vaultup · Bristol 🇬🇧
🧠
AI that knows your numbers
Val knows your income, goals, spending and group pots. Ask her anything — she gives real answers, not generic tips.
🎯
Save for what you want
Set goals for the things that matter to you. Val tracks your progress and nudges you when you're on track — or off it.
👥
Save together
Group savings pots for shared goals — trips, events, anything. Create a group, share a link, track contributions in real time.
🔒
No bank access needed
You enter what you want Val to know. No open banking required. Your data stays yours — always.

Built different

Not another budgeting app

Most money apps tell you to stop spending. Vaultup helps you start saving — there's a difference.

🤖
Val — your AI coach
Straight-talking, no waffle. Val knows your income, goals, spending and group pots — and gives you real, personalised advice.
🎯
Proactive goal saving
Set what you're saving for, how much per month, and Val tracks your progress. Holiday, house deposit, car — whatever matters to you.
👥
Group savings pots
Save together for shared goals — trips, events, anything. Create a group, invite friends, track who's put in what.
📊
Full financial picture
Income, spending, saved this month, group pots, unaccounted money — Val sees everything and tells you what it means.
🔥
Habit-building streaks
Daily streaks, XP, and badges make saving feel like progress — not punishment. Because building a habit should feel good.
🛡️
Private by design
No bank account linking needed. You control what Val knows. Your data is never sold, never shared. GDPR compliant.
Where we're going

Built to grow with you

Vaultup is live and growing. Here's what's coming next.

LIVE NOW
Phase 1
AI Coach + Goals + Groups
Val AI, goal tracking, group savings pots, spending insights, streaks and rewards.
Phase 2
Open Banking
TrueLayer integration — read-only bank linking so Val can see your real spending automatically.
Phase 3
Automated Saving
GoCardless direct debit — Val automatically moves money to your goals on payday.
Phase 4
Real Group Accounts
Modulr pooled accounts — actual shared pots with real money, not just tracking.

Your money.
Your goals.
Your coach.

Free to use. No bank access needed. Just Val — helping you save smarter, one goal at a time.
